_doc: Bounded autonomous-action policy for the agent wallet. The agent may ONLY do what's allowed here. Destinations are a FIXED allowlist in THIS file — never taken from live/web data — so a prompt-injection or poisoned feed cannot redirect funds. Worst case = the capped amount sitting in vetted, audited yield pools. The agent plans continuously (dry-run) and only MOVES money when enabled:true AND the wallet is funded. Funding the wallet is the one step only the operator can do (move money in).
_enabled_doc: MASTER ARM SWITCH. false = DRY-RUN: the agent plans + logs exactly what it WOULD do, moves NOTHING. Flip to true (via the dashboard button) only after funding the wallet — then the agent acts within the bounds below.

caps._doc: Never deploy more than max_total across all pools; never more than max_per_action in one move; always keep min_native (ETH) per chain for gas — never spend it down.

allowlist._doc: The ONLY addresses the agent can ever interact with. Hardcoded here, not from data. Withdrawals can only ever return to the operator's OWN wallet. Pools are battle-tested organic-yield (Aave V3) — the agent picks among THESE based on the live yield ranking, but cannot invent a destination.

strategy._doc: How the agent decides: among allowlisted pools, deploy idle USDC into the one with the best LIVE organic APY (from the keyless yield engine), respecting caps + gas reserve. Re-evaluates each cycle. Pure organic stablecoin lending — no IL, withdraw anytime.

honest: This makes the agent a bounded autonomous yield steward, not a free-roaming spender. It earns real organic yield (~4-6%/yr on stables) on whatever you fund it with — small but genuinely autonomous + compounding, and the worst case is bounded to your funded amount in audited pools. It is NOT a magic money machine; it's knowledge (which yield is real) × your capital × autonomous execution, safely fenced.
shelved_reason: Operator has $0 starting capital — nothing to deploy. This bounded-yield module stays dormant + disarmed. It reactivates ONLY if real capital ever lands in the wallet. From $0 the earners are the free streams, not capital deployment.
